column1: # Activate with: Tools → Partition Scheme → "Custom" (Arduino IDE)
#   0x610000 + 64KB   coredump       — panic dump for post-mortem debug
#   0x620000 + ~9.9MB littlefs       — file system for GPX tracks
#   - LittleFS uses subtype "spiffs" (0x82) by Arduino-ESP32 Core 3.x convention.
#     The code calls LittleFS.begin() — Core picks the right driver automatically.
#   - App slot is 3MB; current firmware ~1.8-2.2MB → ~1MB headroom for growth.
#   - Coredump is optional but cheap (64KB) and invaluable for crash diagnosis.
#   - LittleFS supports wear-leveling and journaling — safe against power loss.
